execution_summary: Built a Python 3.10-slim Docker image with numpy, pandas, and scipy from replication_info.json. Started the container and executed the Python translation entrypoint (replication_data/data cleaning and analysis__py.py). The script completed successfully, producing descriptive statistics and a Mann-Whitney U test comparing first-stage effort between OS and TS. Contrary to the preregistration expectation (TS > OS), the observed means were OS > TS and the Mann-Whitney U test was not significant (p = 0.1505). No code or dependency rewrites were required.

code_executed.logs: Analysis complete. Group summaries: OS (n=156) mean=82.88 median=90.0 sd=27.51; TS (n=156) mean=78.49 median=80.5 sd=27.14. Mann-Whitney U (two-sided) on effort_t1: U=13313.5, p=0.1505, rank-biserial r=0.0941 (expected direction TS > OS).
code_executed.environment: Docker container based on python:3.10-slim with numpy>=1.22.0, pandas>=1.4.0, scipy>=1.8.0

results.hypothesis_tested: First-stage effort in the two-stage tournament (TS) exceeds first-stage effort in the one-stage tournament (OS).

findings_summary.direction: negative (OS > TS on mean; rank-biserial r = 0.0941 indicates OS > TS)
